next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Serum ACE level and 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D measurement
Cardiac MRI to assess for myocardial involvement
Excisional lymph node biopsy if EBUS is non-diagnostic
Comprehensive rheumatologic workup including ANA, ENA panel, and RF
